name: Roquefort Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Roquefort cheese (or other blue-veined cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the self-raising flour into a bowl.
2. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in the well-chilled butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Crumble in the Roquefort cheese; sprinkle in the shredded Cheddar cheese.
4. Mix the ingredients thoroughly with your fingers to form a dough. Cover and refrigerate.
5. Place sesame seeds in a dry skillet. Stir over medium heat until golden.
6. Remove from heat and allow to cool.
7. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
8. Grease two baking sheets.
9. Shape the chilled dough into 36 equal balls.
10. Toss each ball in toasted sesame seeds, pressing the balls flat to coat well with seeds.
11. Arrange the balls on the greased baking sheets and press lightly with a fork.
12. Bake for 10 minutes or until golden around the edges.
13. Cool on racks and store in an airtight container.
14. To serve, arrange on a plate and garnish with cucumber slices and cherries.
Makes 36 biscuits.
